summary: Full testing of RUKOS_CRYPTO HUB trading dashboard with Russian/English localization. All features working correctly including language switcher, Market Core with BTC/ETH/SOL prices, Fear & Greed Index, Gold, Stablecoins, Global Liquidity, ETF Intelligence with filter selector (All/BTC/ETH), and Onchain tab with BTC/ETH/SOL chain selector. Backend uses MOCK data for all analytics endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test@test.com user for login tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests passing. Backend APIs return MOCK data. Language switcher persists in localStorage. ETF filter and Onchain chain selector working correctly.

features_tested.language_switcher: PASS - RU/EN toggle works and persists
features_tested.market_core_btc_eth_sol: PASS - All three crypto prices displayed
features_tested.source_links: PASS - Source links to CoinGecko, Glassnode, SoSoValue present
features_tested.all_tabs_render: PASS - All 9 dashboard tabs render correctly

mocked_data_note: All analytics endpoints return MOCK data from advanced_analytics.py - not real market data
